mapper.insert: INSERT INTO resume_template_patch_draft ( id, template_id, user_id, template_version, status, job_description_hash, patches_json, evidence_candidates_json, validation_errors_json, allowed_field_ids_json, annotation_revision, provider ) VALUES ( #{id}, #{templateId}, #{userId}, #{templateVersion}, #{status}, #{jobDescriptionHash}, #{patchesJson}, #{evidenceCandidatesJson}, #{validationErrorsJson}, #{allowedFieldIdsJson}, #{annotationRevision}, #{provider} )
mapper.update: UPDATE resume_template_patch_draft SET status = #{status}, patches_json = #{patchesJson}, validation_errors_json = #{validationErrorsJson}, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE resume_template_patch_draft SET status = #{status}, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT id, template_id, user_id, template_version, status, job_description_hash, patches_json, evidence_candidates_json, validation_errors_json, allowed_field_ids_json, annotation_revision, provider, created_at, updated_at FROM resume_template_patch_draft WHERE id = #{id} AND template_id = #{templateId} AND user_id = #{userId}
